title: buxus harlandii var. cephalantha
intro: Buxus harlandii var. cephalantha, also known as the Himalayan boxwood, is a variety of the Buxus harlandii plant, a species of flowering plant in the boxwood family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese herbalism, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Buxus harlandii var. cephalantha include its potential to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and improve digestion, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Buxus harlandii var. cephalantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
